name: hyperbrowser-app-patterns
description: Curated agent guidance for building web automation and scraping apps from Hyperbrowser example patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Build browser automation apps using curated Hyperbrowser example patterns.
interface.longDescription: Use Hyperbrowser App Patterns to build web automation, scraping, crawl, research, screenshot, competitor tracking, site-to-dataset, and web-to-agent applications from curated patterns in hyperbrowserai/hyperbrowser-app-examples.
defaultPrompt: Build a Hyperbrowser web automation app.
Design a crawl and extraction workflow with Hyperbrowser.
Review this Hyperbrowser integration for reliability.
